action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 8's checkpoint achieved test AP 0.2017 (new best) with a 400-dim 6-layer MPNN, residual connections, and mean+max pooling. Validation AP peaked at epoch 18 (0.2079) and was still improving until epoch 20, suggesting the model can benefit from more capacity and longer training. Analysis: The model is tiny (~3-5M params) versus the 1B limit. Key improvements with high ROI are (1) adding a virtual node to act as global readout/write, which is known to significantly boost molecular GNNs on OGB, (2) scaling width to 512 and depth to 8, (3) training for 30 epochs with warmup+cosine LR and dropout 0.3 for regularization. Predict.py forward signature is unchanged so it remains compatible. Decision: Update model.py with virtual node and larger architecture, rewrite train.py with 512 batch size, 30 epochs, warmup+cosine schedule, and proper logging. Keep predict.py unchanged. Train now (~75 min estimated), then submit eval next iteration.
